fundamental_news.headline: Rocket Lab Reports Q3 Earnings and Revenues Top Estimates
fundamental_news.summary: Rocket Lab reported Q3 earnings of $0.01 per share, surpassing the consensus estimate of a $0.05 loss, with revenue of $155.08 million exceeding expectations.
fundamental_news.why_it_matters: The earnings beat and revenue growth highlight Rocket Lab's improving financial performance and market position, supporting the long-term investment thesis.

fundamental_news.headline: Rocket Lab Reports Q1 Loss, Tops Revenue Estimates
fundamental_news.summary: Rocket Lab reported a Q1 loss of $0.12 per share, missing the consensus estimate of a $0.10 loss, but revenue of $122.57 million exceeded expectations.
fundamental_news.why_it_matters: While the company reported a loss, the revenue beat indicates strong demand and operational growth, supporting the long-term investment thesis.

fundamental_news.headline: Rocket Lab Successfully Launches 61st Electron Mission, Second Launch for iQPS
fundamental_news.summary: Rocket Lab successfully launched its 61st Electron mission, deploying the QPS-SAR-9 spacecraft for iQPS, marking the second launch for the Japanese customer.
fundamental_news.why_it_matters: Demonstrates Rocket Lab's growing capabilities and reliability in the small satellite launch market, reinforcing its competitive position.

fundamental_news.headline: Rocket Lab Reports Q4 Loss, Tops Revenue Estimates
fundamental_news.summary: Rocket Lab reported a Q4 loss of $0.10 per share, missing the consensus estimate of a $0.09 loss, but revenue of $132.39 million exceeded expectations.
fundamental_news.why_it_matters: The revenue beat suggests strong market demand and operational growth, aligning with the long-term investment thesis focused on Rocket Lab's growth potential.

fundamental_news.headline: Rocket Lab Successfully Launches 60th Electron Mission for BlackSky
fundamental_news.summary: Rocket Lab launched its 60th Electron mission, deploying BlackSky's first Gen-3 satellite, expanding BlackSky's low Earth orbit constellation.
fundamental_news.why_it_matters: Highlights Rocket Lab's consistent performance and ability to meet customer needs, enhancing its reputation and customer trust.

earnings_timeline.notes: The next earnings report is scheduled for February 25, 2026.

fundamental_news.headline: Reddit Inc. (RDDT) Surpasses Q4 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
fundamental_news.summary: Reddit reported Q4 2025 earnings of $1.24 per share, exceeding the consensus estimate of $0.96, with revenues of $725.61 million, surpassing expectations by 8.71%.
fundamental_news.why_it_matters: Strong financial performance indicates effective monetization strategies and user engagement, supporting Reddit's long-term growth prospects.

fundamental_news.headline: Reddit Inc. (RDDT) Surpasses Q3 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
fundamental_news.summary: In Q3 2025, Reddit reported earnings of $0.80 per share, beating the consensus estimate of $0.53, with revenues of $584.91 million, exceeding expectations by 6.31%.
fundamental_news.why_it_matters: Consistent earnings growth reflects Reddit's ability to scale its platform and attract advertisers, reinforcing its competitive moat.

fundamental_news.headline: Reddit Inc. (RDDT) Surpasses Q2 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
fundamental_news.summary: Reddit's Q2 2025 earnings were $0.45 per share, surpassing the consensus estimate of $0.20, with revenues of $499.63 million, exceeding expectations by 16.90%.
fundamental_news.why_it_matters: Strong earnings and revenue growth demonstrate Reddit's effective monetization and user engagement strategies, vital for long-term success.

fundamental_news.headline: Reddit Inc. (RDDT) Tops Q1 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
fundamental_news.summary: In Q1 2025, Reddit reported earnings of $0.13 per share, exceeding the consensus estimate of $0.02, with revenues of $392.36 million, surpassing expectations by 5.45%.
fundamental_news.why_it_matters: Early-year strong performance sets a positive tone for Reddit's financial trajectory, supporting its long-term investment thesis.

fundamental_news.headline: Axon reports Q4 2025 revenue of $797 million, up 39% year over year
fundamental_news.summary: Axon Enterprise announced its Q4 2025 revenue of $797 million, marking a 39% increase from the previous year, driven by strong performance in both Software & Services and Connected Devices segments.
fundamental_news.why_it_matters: This robust financial performance underscores Axon's expanding market presence and the effectiveness of its integrated public safety technology solutions, reinforcing its competitive moat and growth trajectory.

fundamental_news.headline: Axon to acquire AI-powered 911 communications company Prepared, strengthening the public safety ecosystem from call to closure
fundamental_news.summary: Axon announced a definitive agreement to acquire Prepared, an AI-powered emergency communications platform, aiming to enhance its public safety ecosystem by integrating advanced emergency response capabilities.
fundamental_news.why_it_matters: This strategic acquisition aligns with Axon's commitment to innovation and comprehensive public safety solutions, potentially expanding its product offerings and market share in the emergency communications sector.

earnings_timeline.notes: Axon reported a non-GAAP EPS of $1.17 in Q3 FY2025, missing the consensus estimate of $1.63.

fundamental_news.headline: Cantor Fitzgerald Loads Up 3.33 Million IREN Shares
fundamental_news.summary: Cantor Fitzgerald, L.P. disclosed the acquisition of 3,333,423 additional shares of IREN, increasing its position to 1.99% of its 13F assets under management.
fundamental_news.why_it_matters: The significant investment by a reputable financial firm underscores confidence in IREN's strategic direction and growth prospects, particularly in AI cloud services, reinforcing the company's competitive moat and long-term investment thesis.

earnings_timeline.notes: Earnings miss in Q1 FY2026; next earnings report scheduled for February 25, 2026.

fundamental_news.headline: Lundin Gold Sells Silver Stream to LunR Royalties in $490M Deal
fundamental_news.summary: Lundin Gold has agreed to sell a silver stream from its Fruta del Norte mine to LunR Royalties for $490 million, enhancing LunR's position in the precious metals royalty sector.
fundamental_news.why_it_matters: This strategic acquisition by LunR Royalties strengthens its portfolio, potentially increasing future cash flows and market competitiveness.

earnings_timeline.notes: The next earnings report is anticipated on May 13, 2026.

fundamental_news.headline: Micron Rides Record HBM Demand And US$200b AI Expansion Plans
fundamental_news.summary: Micron Technology is experiencing unprecedented demand for high bandwidth memory (HBM) products, leading to sold-out 2026 production capacity. The company plans to invest at least $200 billion in new U.S. manufacturing facilities, supported by significant government subsidies, focusing on higher-margin AI and enterprise memory over lower-margin consumer segments.
fundamental_news.why_it_matters: This development underscores Micron's strategic shift towards high-margin AI and enterprise memory markets, aligning with the growing demand for AI infrastructure and data centers, which is central to its long-term growth strategy.

earnings_timeline.notes: Micron reported strong Q1 FY2026 earnings, exceeding expectations, and provided robust guidance for the upcoming quarter.
The next earnings report is scheduled for March 24, 2026, providing further insights into the company's financial health and strategic initiatives.
CrowdStrike reported strong Q3 FY2026 results, with revenue exceeding expectations by 22% year-over-year to $1.23 billion.
Q3 FY2026 earnings report released on December 11, 2025.
